title: Add user-specified website to the Games/Education page

requirements.summary: Add a new education site card to the Games page with placeholder content that prompts the user to provide a URL, matching the existing card style and grid layout
acceptanceCriteria: A new card appears in the Games page grid alongside the existing 10 game site cards.
The card displays an icon, a site name, and a brief description consistent with the existing card style.
Clicking the card opens the target URL in a new proxy iframe tab using the same proxy fallback chain as all other cards.
The card has the same neon glow hover effect and glassmorphism styling as the existing cards.
The new card does not break the responsive grid layout on desktop or tablet widths.

file_operations.description: Add a new card object to the existing educationalSites array. The new card must be clearly labeled 'New Education Site' with a generic education icon (GraduationCap from lucide-react), description 'User-requested educational site', and a placeholder URL (e.g., 'https://example.com/education'). Use a visually distinct color (e.g., colors.indigo or colors.cyan) not already used by the existing 10 cards. Include a note in the description field prompting the user to update the URL. Ensure the card uses the same structure as existing cards: { name, url, icon, color, description } and that clicking it invokes openUrl with the URL to open in a proxy tab. Verify that the card integrates naturally into the responsive grid without breaking the layout on desktop or tablet.
